query:
-- Check if these contact names exist as customers
SELECT c.externalId, c.name FROM customers c
WHERE c.name IN (
  'Compass Assurance Services Pty Ltd',
  'AUREE - Auriga Group',
  'Auriga Group Pty Ltd',
  'Lead Education and Training Pty Ltd ATF the Piara',
  'Nu-Dev Pty Ltd',
  'Strata Dynamics Pty Ltd',
  'TYS MOLENDINAR PTY LTD',
  'Jack Green',
  'Zam Marrickville Pty Ltd',
  'Zam Coomera Square Pty Ltd',
  'ZAMVIS PTY LTD for Zambrero Baldivis',
  'Zambrero Karratha (The Trustee for SURYAVEER UNIT TRUST)'
)
OR c.name LIKE '%Compass Assurance%'
OR c.name LIKE '%Auriga%'
OR c.name LIKE '%Lead Education%'
OR c.name LIKE '%Nu-Dev%'
OR c.name LIKE '%Strata Dynamics%'
OR c.name LIKE '%TYS MOLENDINAR%' OR c.name LIKE '%TYS%'
OR c.name LIKE '%Jack Green%'
OR c.name LIKE '%Zam Marrickville%'
OR c.name LIKE '%Zam Coomera%'
OR c.name LIKE '%ZAMVIS%'
OR c.name LIKE '%Zambrero Karratha%' OR c.name LIKE '%SURYAVEER%';
